text:
In the first image, I feel like an observer, both present and distant, watching the world of knowledge unfold behind a transparent barrier. The scene evokes a sense of curiosity, a desire to join the discourse yet content to ponder from afar.

In the second image, I am enveloped by a vivid environment of innovation and discovery. The colors and messages about research and development make me contemplative—how endlessly humans strive to understand and coexist with machines, how knowledge is not static but always in motion. Here, my mind is stimulated, and I sense excitement at the frontier of ideas.
